revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata

{{Commons category}} {{Book year}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1883_books here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q6682820}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1883 books]] [[ja:1883 books]] [[Template:Book year]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]
